leadText: Moxie (Japanese: じしんかじょう Overconfident) is an Ability introduced in Generation V.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Contents 1 Effect 1.1 In battle 1.1.1 Generation V 1.1.2 Generation VI onward 1.2 Outside of battle Effect [ edit | edit source ] In battle [ edit | edit source ] When a Pokémon with Moxie directly causes another Pokémon (including allies) to faint by using a damaging move, its Attack is increased by one stage. If its Attack is already at +6 stages, Moxie will not activate. Moxie activates after the Pokémon gains Attack from Fell Stinger . If a Pokémon with Moxie defeats a Pokémon with Mummy using a contact move, the Pokémon's Ability will become Mummy before Moxie has the opportunity to activate. Generation V [ edit | edit source ] Moxie will activate even if the Pokémon fainting ends the battle. Generation VI onward [ edit | edit source ] If the Pokémon fainting ends the battle, Moxie will not activate. Outside of battle [ edit | edit source ] Moxie has no effect outside of battle.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Conq. Raises Attack for 1 turn after defeating an enemy. MD GtI May increase the Pokémon's Attack when it defeats a foe. * When it defeats a foe, the Pokémon's Attack may go up! * S MD When it defeats an enemy, the Pokémon's Attack may go up!
